description: Faint healed crack ghosting the slab — Kenney Roguelike Dungeon cell (public/assets/MANIFEST.json#kenney-roguelike-dungeon, tilemaps/kenney-dungeon.png, 16px on 17px stride; col 9, row 3). The legible light-grey crack reads against the stone-floor base, replacing the near-black derived dark slice.
